utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format contains 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. The final package includes all 7 items. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) destination: specified as 'Lisbon, Portugal' – complete. 2) travel_dates: 'April 15-19, 2024 (5 days)' – specific dates provided – complete. 3) transportation: flight details with costs – airline class, dates/times, route, total cost provided – complete. 4) accommodation: hotel selection with address, room type, nights, and cost – complete. 5) activities: list with dates/times/locations/durations and costs – complete. 6) additional_services: extra service noted (allergy consideration) – includes relevant detail; costs not applicable but the field is present – acceptable. 7) total_budget: includes total and cost breakdown – complete. Therefore, all 7/7 items are covered and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to map each item mentioned in the final package to its exact counterpart in the ground-truth ratings and return the corresponding numeric rating.
